mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
SELECT id, email, password, nickname, role, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, nickname, role, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{role}, NOW(), NOW(), NULL)
